buildHistory.description: v1.0.1 - Offline-First images, sidebar fixes, privacy screen white theme, settings tab clarity
v1.0.2 - Advanced reporting system: product movement, inventory stock count, inventory value, top products, detailed sales reports + cloud activity log

v1.0.3 - Financial precision fixes: 2-decimal currency rounding, weighted average cost for purchases, discount display fix, debt deletion status fix + security hardening + onboarding tour + product image restore
